name: TC-37: Forecasting Calculation and MAPE
description: Selecting a product with at least 3 historical sales periods displays its trend moment forecast and MAPE.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Peramalan Stok sidebar navigation item
Select the target product with historical sales data from the dropdown
Verify the linear regression formula parameters are calculated and displayed on screen
Verify the MAPE percentage value and the model accuracy label are visible
